sb_prompt: DISCUSS HOW YOU AND THE OTHER CALLER KEEP UP ON CURRENT EVENTS.      DO YOU GET MOST OF YOUR NEWS FROM TVOR PEOPLE YOU KNOW?  ARE YOU SATISFIED WITH THE QUALITY OF COVERAGE?
raw_output:
ParticipantA: Hello!
ParticipantB: Hello! How are you doing today?
ParticipantA: I'm doing well, thanks. How about you?
ParticipantB: I'm doing good. Thanks for asking. So, how do you keep up with current events?
ParticipantA: Mostly through word of mouth from people I know. I don't have a TV, so I don't really watch the news on TV.
ParticipantB: I see. I mostly get my news from TV, specifically from CNN and Fox News. I also follow some news outlets on social media to stay updated. How do you feel about the quality of coverage?
ParticipantA: I haven't really paid much attention to the news in a while, so I can't really say. But I've heard that a lot of the news these days is biased and not entirely truthful.
ParticipantB: That can be true sometimes, but I feel like the news outlets I follow do a good job of presenting the news objectively. Of course, it's always important to take what you hear with a grain of salt and do your own research to verify the information.
ParticipantA: That's a good point. I haven't really thought about doing my own research, but I should start doing that.
ParticipantB: Definitely. It's important to be informed and to make sure the information you're getting is accurate. Have you heard about any specific news stories or events that you found particularly interesting or important?
ParticipantA: Not recently, no. But I do remember a few years ago when there was a big story about a shooting at a school, and that was really sad.
ParticipantB: Yes, that was a tragic event. There have been many other important stories since then, such as the COVID-19 pandemic and the ongoing political situation in the United States.
ParticipantA: Yeah, I've heard a little bit about those things, but not much. I haven't really been paying attention to the news lately.
ParticipantB: Well, it's never too late to start. There are always important things happening in the world that we should be aware of. If you ever want to talk about any specific news stories, I'm happy to chat.
ParticipantA: Thanks, I appreciate that. It's always good to have someone to talk to about these things.
ParticipantB: Absolutely. It's important to stay informed and engaged in current events, and I'm always here to discuss anything with you.
